mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recordings ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM recordings WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recordings (id, rule_id, environment_id, agent_id, protocol, host, port, service_name, method, path, request_headers_json, request_body, response_status_code, response_headers_json, response_body, response_time_ms, recorded_at, tags_json) VALUES (#{id}, #{ruleId}, #{environmentId}, #{agentId}, #{protocol}, #{host}, #{port}, #{serviceName}, #{method}, #{path}, #{requestHeadersJson}, #{requestBody}, #{responseStatusCode}, #{responseHeadersJson}, #{responseBody}, #{responseTimeMs}, #{recordedAt}, #{tagsJson})
